briefdescription.para: Build an NMT Master command frame.

parameterdescription.para: Target node ID (1..127 or 0 for broadcast).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CANOpenManager *mgr, SYN_CAN_Frame *frame, uint8_t node_id, uint16_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: syn_canopen_mgr_sdo_read_init

briefdescription.para: Initiate an SDO Read request to a remote slave node.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if initiated, SYN_BUSY if SDO client is busy.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CANOpenManager *mgr, SYN_CAN_Frame *frame, uint8_t node_id, uint16_t index, uint8_t subindex, const void *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_canopen_mgr_sdo_write_init

briefdescription.para: Initiate an SDO Write request to a remote slave node.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to payload bytes to write.
Data length (1..4 bytes for expedited write).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if initiated, SYN_BUSY if busy.

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming CAN frame for Manager processing (Heartbeats, SDO responses).
Advance CANopen Manager periodic timer ticks.
Implementation of CANopen CiA 302 Manager, SDO Client & NMT Master.
